strengths: Deep expertise in full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure development, including MCP and agentic workflows
Proven leadership in open-source and entrepreneurial ventures (GISCollective, multiple startups)
Strong technical breadth across languages, cloud, and DevOps (TypeScript, AWS CDK, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Lacks explicit AI/ML product development or research experience in resume details
No formal advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field, despite strong CS background
Minimal evidence of advising strategic customers/partners on AI technologies in past roles
response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates exceptional technical versatility and leadership through open-source contributions and startup experience, but the resume lacks explicit AI-focused products or platforms. While she has high-performance infrastructure experience, there is no clear evidence of AI strategy, ML systems, or advising customers on AI adoption. Her entrepreneurial background is strong, but the role requires deeper AI specialization.
